data.content: Implementation review: audited all action-state skill prompts in skills/*.md and confirmed every success/failure/deferral/rejection path includes --add-handoff-capsule with full agent metadata flags (--handoff-username, --handoff-datetime, --handoff-agentname, --handoff-model, --handoff-version). Existing commit b336ace satisfies the requirement; no additional file edits required.
